what: digitraffic: R Client for the Finntraffic Digitraffic TMS (LAM) API — digitraffic-package
title: digitraffic: R Client for the Finntraffic Digitraffic TMS (LAM) API — digitraffic-package
text: Provides functions access traffic measurement data Finnish Transport Infrastructure Agency's Digitraffic open API. Covers TMS (Traffic Measurement System, known LAM Finnish) stations including real-time sensor data, station metadata, sensor calibration constants, historical raw vehicle-level observations. data returned tidy tibbles ready analysis.

title: digitraffic: R Client for the Finntraffic Digitraffic TMS (LAM) API — digitraffic-package
text: Maintainer: Theo Blauberg theo.blauberg@outlook.com (ORCID) [copyright holder] Authors: Theo Blauberg theo.blauberg@outlook.com (ORCID) [copyright holder]

what: Clear the in-session digitraffic cache — dt_cache_clear
title: Clear the in-session digitraffic cache — dt_cache_clear
text: Station metadata cached 5 minutes within R session avoid redundant API calls.  Call function force next dt_stations() dt_station() call fetch fresh data.

title: Clear the in-session digitraffic cache — dt_cache_clear
Clear the in-session digitraffic cache — dt_cache_clear
text: Invisibly returns NULL.

title: Clear the in-session digitraffic cache — dt_cache_clear

what: Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
title: Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
text: Downloads parses raw CSV one station one day.  row represents single vehicle passage measurement loop. Raw data available December 2021 onwards published following day 08:00–09:00 EET.

title: Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
text: tms_number single positive integer: station's tms_number (id).  Use dt_stations() read tms_number column. different id used dt_station_data(). date single Date object day retrieve, e.g. .Date("2024-03-15").  Must least one day past earlier 2021-12-01.

title: Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
text: tibble one row per vehicle passage columns: station_id Integer. TMS station number file. year_short Integer. 2-digit year. day_of_year Integer. Day number (1–366). hour, minute, second, centisecond Integer. Passage time components. vehicle_length_m Double. Vehicle length metres. lane Integer. Lane number. direction Integer. 1 = increasing direction, 2 = decreasing. vehicle_class Integer. Class code 1–7 (see dt_vehicle_classes()). speed_kmh Integer. Speed km/h. quality_flag Integer. 0 = valid, 1 = outside valid range. interval_ms Integer. Time since previous vehicle (ms). time_in_loop_ms Integer. Time vehicle spent loop (ms). datetime POSIXct (Europe/Helsinki). Full passage timestamp. vehicle_class_label Character. English label vehicle class.

title: Fetch raw historical vehicle-level data for a LAM/TMS station — dt_history_raw
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # One day of data for station with tms_number = 1 raw <- dt_history_raw(tms_number = 1, date = as.Date("2024-03-15"))  # Hourly traffic volume by direction library(dplyr) raw |>   filter(quality_flag == 0) |>   mutate(hour_of_day = hour) |>   count(hour_of_day, direction) } # }

what: Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
title: Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
text: Fetches station-specific calibration values: free-flow speeds (VVAPAAS1/VVAPAAS2), maximum hourly capacity (MS1/MS2), road direction (Tien_suunta).  Many stations seasonal variants separate summer winter values.

title: Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
text: id NULL (default) return constants stations, single positive integer station id filter one station.

title: Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
text: tibble columns: station_id Integer. Station id. data_updated_time POSIXct (UTC). constants last updated. name Character. Constant name: "VVAPAAS1", "VVAPAAS2", "MS1", "MS2", "Tien_suunta". value Double. Constant value (speed km/h, count veh/h, bearing degrees). valid_from Character. Start validity period, "MM-DD" format. valid_to Character. End validity period, "MM-DD" format.

title: Get sensor calibration constants for LAM/TMS stations — dt_sensor_constants
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Constants for all stations dt_sensor_constants()  # Constants for a single station dt_sensor_constants(id = 23001)  # Free-flow speeds only library(dplyr) dt_sensor_constants() |>   filter(grepl("^VVAPAAS", name)) } # }

what: List all available LAM/TMS sensor types — dt_sensors
title: List all available LAM/TMS sensor types — dt_sensors
text: Fetches catalogue sensor types used across LAM stations. sensor unique id matches sensor_id column returned dt_station_data().

title: List all available LAM/TMS sensor types — dt_sensors
List all available LAM/TMS sensor types — dt_sensors
text: tibble columns: id Integer. Sensor identifier. name Character. Full Finnish sensor name, e.g. "OHITUKSET_5MIN_KIINTEA_SUUNTA1". short_name Character. Abbreviated label. unit Character. Measurement unit ("km/h", "kpl/h", "***"). direction Character. "INCREASING_DIRECTION", "DECREASING_DIRECTION", "UNKNOWN". description_fi Character. Finnish description. description_en Character. English description (often NA).

title: List all available LAM/TMS sensor types — dt_sensors
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ dt_sensors()  # Speed sensors only library(dplyr) dt_sensors() |> filter(unit == "km/h") } # }

what: Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
title: Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
text: Fetches extended metadata one station internal API id. look id first, use dt_stations().

title: Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
text: id single positive integer: station's id returned dt_stations().  Note: tms_number (used historical CSV downloads via dt_history_raw()).

title: Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
text: one-row tibble columns: id, tms_number, name, name_fi, name_sv, name_en Identifiers multilingual names. longitude, latitude, elevation WGS-84 coordinates. bearing Road bearing degrees. collection_status, collection_interval, state Operational status. station_type Hardware type, e.g. "DSL_6". municipality, municipality_code Municipality name code. province, province_code Province name code. direction1_municipality, direction1_municipality_code Municipality direction 1. direction2_municipality, direction2_municipality_code Municipality direction 2. road_number, road_section, distance_from_section_start Road address. carriageway Carriageway descriptor. free_flow_speed1, free_flow_speed2 Free-flow speed (km/h) per direction. livi_id LIVI system identifier. purpose Measurement purpose. start_time, data_updated_time POSIXct (UTC) timestamps.

title: Get detailed metadata for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Look up a station id first stations <- dt_stations(name = "Espoo") dt_station(stations$id[[1]]) } # }

what: Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
title: Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
text: Fetches current sensor values one station.  Data updated approximately every minute.

title: Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
text: id single positive integer: station's id (tms_number). Use dt_stations() look station ids.

title: Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
text: tibble one row per sensor reading columns: station_id Integer. Station id. tms_number Integer. TMS system number. data_updated_time POSIXct (UTC). station data updated. sensor_id Integer. Sensor identifier (see dt_sensors()). name Character. Full Finnish sensor name. short_name Character. Abbreviated label. value Double. Measured value. unit Character. Unit, e.g. "km/h", "kpl/h", "***". measured_time POSIXct (UTC). measurement taken. time_window_start, time_window_end POSIXct (UTC). Aggregation window.

title: Get real-time sensor data for a single LAM/TMS station — dt_station_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Real-time speeds and counts for station 23001 dt_station_data(23001)  # Filter to speed sensors only library(dplyr) dt_station_data(23001) |> filter(unit == "km/h") } # }

what: List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
title: List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
text: Fetches metadata automatic traffic measurement (LAM/TMS) stations Digitraffic API.  Results cached 5 minutes within current R session; call dt_cache_clear() force fresh fetch.

title: List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
text: name NULL (default) character string used case-insensitive regular expression filter stations name. Station names typically encode road location, e.g. "vt1_Espoo_Hirvisuo".

title: List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
text: tibble one row per station columns: id Integer. Internal API station identifier. tms_number Integer. TMS system number (used history CSV). name Character. Station name. longitude Double. WGS-84 longitude. latitude Double. WGS-84 latitude. elevation Double. Elevation metres. bearing Integer. Road bearing degrees (0–360). collection_status Character. "GATHERING" "REMOVED_TEMPORARILY". state Character. Operational state, e.g. "OK". data_updated_time POSIXct (UTC). Time record last updated.

title: List all LAM/TMS measurement stations — dt_stations
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # All stations dt_stations()  # Stations whose name contains "Espoo" dt_stations(name = "Espoo")  # Stations on valtatie 1 (road E18) dt_stations(name = "^vt1_") } # }

what: Get real-time sensor data for all LAM/TMS stations — dt_stations_data
title: Get real-time sensor data for all LAM/TMS stations — dt_stations_data
text: Fetches current sensor values every station single request. response typically several MB may take seconds. Data updated approximately every minute.

title: Get real-time sensor data for all LAM/TMS stations — dt_stations_data
Get real-time sensor data for all LAM/TMS stations — dt_stations_data
text: tibble columns dt_station_data(), one row per sensor per station.

title: Get real-time sensor data for all LAM/TMS stations — dt_stations_data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ all_data <- dt_stations_data()  # Average speed across all stations, direction 1 library(dplyr) all_data |>   filter(grepl("KESKINOPEUS_60MIN.*SUUNTA1", name)) |>   summarise(mean_speed = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)) } # }

what: Vehicle classification codes used in LAM raw data — dt_vehicle_classes
title: Vehicle classification codes used in LAM raw data — dt_vehicle_classes
text: Returns lookup table mapping integer vehicle class codes (1-7) English Finnish labels, used vehicle_class column dt_history_raw().

title: Vehicle classification codes used in LAM raw data — dt_vehicle_classes
Vehicle classification codes used in LAM raw data — dt_vehicle_classes
text: tibble columns: vehicle_class Integer. Class code (1-7). label_en Character. English label. label_fi Character. Finnish label (UTF-8).

title: Vehicle classification codes used in LAM raw data — dt_vehicle_classes
code: dt_vehicle_classes() #> # A tibble: 7 × 3 #>   vehicle_class label_en                  label_fi                             #>           <int> <chr>                     <chr>                                #> 1             1 Car / van                 Henkilö- tai pakettiauto             #> 2             2 Truck (no trailer)        Kuorma-auto (ei perävaunua)          #> 3             3 Bus                       Linja-auto                           #> 4             4 Truck + semitrailer       Kuorma-auto ja puoliperävaunu        #> 5             5 Truck + full trailer      Kuorma-auto ja täysperävaunu         #> 6             6 Car + caravan / motorhome Henkilöauto ja asuntovaunu tai -auto #> 7             7 Motorcycle / moped        Moottoripyörä tai mopo
